articles.description: EF Core Lazy Loading Performance GotchaSound Code - Mark Heath's Blog  / 11d I was recently using EF Core's ILazyLoader for lazy loading without proxies , and ran into a performance issue that took me by surprise. articles.description: The grief when AI writes most of the codeThe Pragmatic Engineer  / 12d I’m coming to terms with the high probability that AI will write most of my code which I ship to prod, going forward.
